config.seed_text: A research vessel recovered a transmission from the trench floor. It began as engineering telemetry and slowly turned into philosophy.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Fastest baseline; useful as a collapse-prone small reference model.

records.output_text: The team could not begin to explore this particular method or practice properly on its own until they came up with an understanding of what works best for their respective languages rather than just applying them along a line drawn down either side of the field at first glance - often referred to as †tribal communication between two distinct regions‡ (also called LAS) which makes sense when talking about linguistic systems involving multiple types that differ across different populations(s). This leads to several problems associated with translation being very hard to read if you intend to use any other system such as grammatical linguistics; there can only be one way we do so
